name: Number C69: Heraldry Crest of Horror
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>６９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋章死神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デス・メダリオン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カオス・オブ・アームズ
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Rokujūkyū Desu Medarion Kaosu Obu Āmuzu
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 69: Death Medallion Chaos of Arms
desc:
4 Level 5 monsters
When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can destroy all cards your opponent controls. If this card has "Number 69: Heraldry Crest" as an Xyz Material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster your opponent controls; this card gains ATK equal to that face-up monster's original ATK, and if it gains ATK this way, this card's name becomes that monster's, and it gains that monster's original effect. These effects last until the End Phase.

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
